assertions.description: INCORRECT: The gerber alignment check reports aligned=True with no issues, but the F.SilkS layer extents are 62.752mm x 114.348mm while the Edge.Cuts outline is only 55.5mm x 95.5mm. The front silkscreen is ~7mm taller and ~19mm wider than the board outline. This is a real alignment/overflow issue that should be flagged — silkscreen graphics extend outside the PCB boundary. The silkscreen label text ('ADAFRUIT METRO MINI', 'MAXBOTIX MB1010', 'SSD1306 OLED LCD') appears to be the cause. The analyzer should warn when a silkscreen layer bbox significantly exceeds the Edge.Cuts bbox.
